extortion.description: 2lg-prod.com zoominfo.com/c/2lg-prod/532401614 2LG PROD S.r.l. is an Italian company specializing in the design and production of professional cleaning machines and floor maintenance equipment. They offer a wide range of products including scrubber dryers, sweepers, and vacuum cleaners for industrial and commercial use. The company focuses on innovation, reliability, and high performance to meet diverse cleaning needs.
